segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hey, Josie, how's the apartment hunt going? I'm so glad you asked. I think I found the one. It's close to campus, which is nice. That's awesome. You'll be near the University. That’d be convenient. Did you sign the lease yet? Not yet. I'm meeting with the landlord tomorrow. I'll tour the grounds and see the pool too. Good luck. I'll keep my fingers crossed.
